description: Marker file ONLY — signals to Node's module loader that .js files under research/ are ES modules, so `node --test` can execute the Phase 1+ unit/integration tests without a build step. This file introduces zero dependencies and has no effect whatsoever on the browser runtime: browsers determine module-ness from the <script type="module"> attribute (already used for mtf/src/index.js), never from package.json. This is a test-tooling-only addition — see the Phase 1 Implementation Report's 'Smallest Additive Amendments' section.
